title: Fetch Data in ngOnInit
description: Create a component that loads data from an API endpoint in ngOnInit and renders the result with *ngFor.
checklist: Implement ngOnInit to fetch data asynchronously
Update the items array with the response

hints.guide: Import Component and OnInit, then define the component metadata
Create an array property to hold fetched items
hints.code:
export class FetchDataComponent implements OnInit {
  items: string[] = [];

hints.guide: Fetch JSON data in ngOnInit and assign it to items
